Defendant was to appear via Court Call which did not occur. The hearing now is limited to the issue of sanctions. Plaintiffs John Cowden And Thelma Melzer's Motion For Order Allowing Amendment To First Amended Complaint To Correct Plaintiffs Names - Re-hearing re: costs/sanctions is Denied. No sanctions. In the future party can make motions and the Court will make a ruling.
